chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI S.M.A. No. 392 of 2018 ________________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________________________ For hearing of main petition. 29.01.2019 Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, Advocate for petitioner. ====================== This petition for grant of letter of administration and succession certificate was filed in respect of the estate of the late Asrar Hussain Siddiqui. Mr. Siddiqui expired on 22-9-2017 leaving behind the heirs identified in paragraph 2 of the petition. His widow, Tahira Asrar Siddiqui filed the petition on her behalf as well as on behalf of the other legal heirs. Tahira Asrar Siddiqui and Muzna Siddiqui (on her behalf and on behalf of her siblings) have effected an appearance along with the two witnesses, Qazi Mohammad Ali and Farsheed Rohani. All confirm the contents of the petition. The Deputy Registrar (O.S.) report of 13-12-2018 shows that all formalities are complete. No objections have been received to date. This is a non-contentious matter. There appears to be no impediment in the issuance of a Letter of Administration as well as a Succession Certificate (pertaining to the properties disclosed in the Schedule to the petition) in favour of all the legal heirs of the late Asrar Hussain Siddiqui. Office to do the needful, subject to rules. JUDGE
